suggestion.rationale: Merge under Identity Merge Canon test 2 (same-object test): both records are contractor entities (entity_type = 'contractor') with the same base entity name (LK Comstock and Company LLC / L.K. Comstock & Company LLC). The name differences are minor punctuation and abbreviation (e.g., 'and' vs '&', periods in initials), and the second record's id suffix '-cpc-may2022' is a source-local meeting/date identifier that does not indicate a distinct entity. No strong identity fields contradict. Evidence shows both refer to the same contractor in MTA contract contexts. Therefore they are duplicates and should merge.
